content:
Apple has released a new video ad that highlights how the Health app works with iPhone and Apple Watch. The commercial centers around someone receiving lots of unsolicited health advice from strangers in public.

Health highlighted with iPhone 17 Pro and Apple Watch Series 11 together

All the unwanted help becomes overwhelming fast as the tension builds up.

Ultimately, the person at the center of the ad spot turns to their Apple Watch and iPhone 17 Pro to discover actually helpful insight from the Health app.

The wonderfully clever tagline? “Listen to your body. Not everybody.”

It’s a very relatable scenario that does a great job of highlighting iPhone 17 Pro and Apple Watch Series 11 together.

You can find the new Apple Watch Series 11 for as low as $299 on Amazon today.
